reviews.comment:
Atienden bien y rápido los playeros. Siempre hay gente que se queja de todo, en cualquier rubro ;).

2.
Tienen un lugar para comer algo con la calidad y precios razonables de la cadena. Atención esmerada.
También es práctico para hacer tiempo si vas al taller cuando el arreglo es corto, ej. cambio de aceite. Suele estar concurrido pero hay muchas mesas. Sumás puntos con Serviclub.

3.
También podés hacer todos los trámites del club en una oficina ahí en PB, resuelven y son cordiales.
Una chica alta con anteojos nos consiguió las copias de los carnets y del seguro. Híper atenta con mamá (81).
Se fijó que no se le mueva la silla y no se resbale en el desnivel al salir. Casi nadie es amable con el adulto mayor con discapacidad en Buenos Aires.

4.
Daniel del negocio en PB, eficiente y paciente con todo lo que tenía que comprar para q' no vuelva a jorobarse el auto en breve.

5.
El aparato para ponerle aire a las cubiertas funca mejor que el de ACA libertador y tiene más espacio para no estorbar a los demás.

6.
Resumen, recomendable, sin problemas que un lego en el tema autos como yo pueda notar.

(Translated by Google)
The attendants are quick and helpful. There are always people who complain about everything, in every industry ;).

2. They have a place to eat with the chain's usual quality and reasonable prices. The service is excellent.
It's also convenient for killing time if you're going to the garage for a quick repair, like an oil change. It's usually busy, but there are plenty of tables. You earn points with Serviclub.

3. You can also take care of all your club paperwork at an office on the ground floor. They're helpful and friendly. A tall woman with glasses got us copies of our membership cards and insurance. She was incredibly attentive to my mother (81). She made sure her wheelchair didn't move or slip on the step when we left. Almost no one is kind to elderly people with disabilities in Buenos Aires.

4. Daniel from the shop on the ground floor was efficient and patient with everything I needed to buy so my car wouldn't break down again anytime soon.

5. The tire inflator works better than the one at ACA Libertador and has more space so it doesn't get in other people's way.

6. In short, highly recommended. No problems that someone like me, who's not very knowledgeable about cars, would notice.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxcXN5bzdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
No son organizados para ordenar la fila, si quieres ingresar solo al full, hay que dar toda una vuelta porque la principal está bloqueda por la fila del combustible

(Translated by Google)
They're not organized in terms of queuing; if you only want to go to the full station, you have to go all the way around because the main line is blocked by the fuel line.
